description: Baseline: 987 tests passing, 0 failing across 41 files in warcraft-core

Fix slugifyTaskName consecutive hyphens, remove redundant double-slugification in parseTasksFromPlan, remove redundant buildEffectiveDependencies in computeRunnableStatus, filter undefined from worktreeService conflict arrays
Guard FilesystemPlanStore.approve and revokeApproval against missing feature.json to prevent writing corrupt empty objects
Fix Biome formatting for long conflict filter line in worktreeService.ts
Fix parseTasksFromPlan Depends on parsing for bold-colon markdown pattern (**Depends on:** 1, 2) that leaked asterisks into captured value causing dependency numbers to be dropped
Fix worktreeService merge conflict handler to read actual HEAD after abort instead of stale beforeHead (partial cherry-picks in rebase strategy advance HEAD)
Add validation for TaskService.create order parameter - reject zero, negative, and non-integer values that would produce malformed folder names
Fix inconsistent BOM handling in stripRedundantLeadingHeading - always strip BOM from content regardless of heading match, preventing invisible BOM characters from leaking into rendered context
Add explicit folderSource: 'stored' to FilesystemTaskStore.get() for consistency with BeadsTaskStore and to prevent future bugs from undefined folderSource
Fix Biome formatting for depends-on value parsing chain in taskService.ts
